summary: Made two surgical opening edits: tightened the carryover from the prior chapter's border alert and rephrased Sylvia's first notification about Crane so the beat stays intact without echoing a calibration-only style-bible line. The chapter ending already remained distinct from both adjacent handoffs, so it was left unchanged.
edits: Specified that Anya's overnight WISE traffic was border traffic to strengthen the transition out of Chapter 12's pager alert.
Rephrased Sylvia's opening Kreuzfeld briefing while preserving the same timing, breach, and death facts.
